details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is missing (expected: reports/audit/ and reports/board/ both exist)
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory missing; all other governance contracts present (memory_bank/ has docs, .cursor/automations/ has README + specs, reports/audit/ exists)

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py, agents/); scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot module; scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot (documents removal but is a .py script). Excluded from flag: reports/audit/*, docs/*.md, MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md, and governance-checking scripts (run_governance_integrity_once.py, run_sre_anomaly_scan.py) which reference patterns for detection only.
